coverage_note: The bundled FTO population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from FTO RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000140718: FTO coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: FTO findings should be read against RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) is curated as a FTO marker for Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
